name: rolepod-uiproof
description: Multi-platform UI/mobile automation for AI agents — 5 shipped skills (verify-ui, audit-a11y, visual-diff, scaffold-e2e, check-errors) + MCP server with 26 tools. v0.5 completes the UI verification surface: console + network observability, hover/drag/fill_form/upload/dialog, runtime emulation, multi-page, gated JS eval.

interface.shortDescription: UI verification, a11y audits, visual diff, e2e scaffolding — for AI coding agents.
interface.longDescription: rolepod-uiproof ships an MCP server with 26 tools (21 atomic + 5 composite) and 5 user-invocable skills (/verify-ui, /audit-a11y, /visual-diff, /scaffold-e2e, /check-errors). Web is fully supported via Playwright; mobile (iOS/Android via Appium) supports basic input. v0.5 completes the UI verification surface — console logs, network requests, HAR/video/trace capture, runtime emulation, multi-page popups.
defaultPrompt: Use /verify-ui to drive a real browser through the change I just made and prove it works.
Use /audit-a11y to scan the page for WCAG-AA issues.
Use /scaffold-e2e to convert this verify run into a runnable Playwright test.
